331: export async function handleCreateReview(request: Request, env: Env, ctx?: ExecutionContext): Promise<Response> {
332:   try {
333:     if (!env.REVIEWS_QUEUE && !ctx) {
334:       return jsonResponse(
335:         {
336:           error: 'Review runner is unavailable',
337:           code: 'review_runner_unavailable',
338:         },
339:         503
340:       );
341:     }
342: 
343:     const idempotencyKey = (request.headers.get('Idempotency-Key') ?? '').trim();
344:     if (!idempotencyKey) {
345:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing required Idempotency-Key header' }, 400);
346:     }
347:     const reviewGithubToken = readReviewGithubTokenHeader(request);
348:     const workerGithubToken = typeof env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN === 'string' && env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN.trim()
349:       ? env.REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN.trim()
350:       : null;
351: 
352:     const payloadRaw = await request.text();
353:     const payload = payloadRaw.trim() ? (JSON.parse(payloadRaw) as unknown) : {};
354:     if (!isRecord(payload)) {
355:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
356:     }
357: 
358:     const target = isRecord(payload.target) ? payload.target : null;
359:     if (!target) {
360:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'target is required' }, 400);
361:     }
362: 
363:     const targetType = typeof target.type === 'string' ? target.type.trim() : '';
364:     if (targetType !== 'workspace_deployment') {
365:       return jsonResponse(
366:         {
367:           error: 'Unsupported review target',
368:           code: 'unsupported_review_target',
369:           allowedTargets: ['workspace_deployment'],
370:         },
371:         400
372:       );
373:     }
374: 
375:     const workspaceId = typeof target.workspaceId === 'string' ? target.workspaceId.trim() : '';
376:     const deploymentId = typeof target.deploymentId === 'string' ? target.deploymentId.trim() : '';
377:     if (!workspaceId || !deploymentId) {
378:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'target.workspaceId and target.deploymentId are required' }, 400);
379:     }
380: 
381:     const mode = typeof payload.mode === 'string' && payload.mode.trim() ? payload.mode.trim() : 'report_only';
382:     if (mode !== 'report_only') {
383:       return jsonResponse(
384:         {
385:           error: 'Unsupported review mode',
386:           code: 'unsupported_review_mode',
387:           allowedModes: ['report_only'],
388:         },
389:         400
390:       );
391:     }
392: 
393:     const policy = isRecord(payload.policy) ? payload.policy : {};
394:     const format = isRecord(payload.format) ? payload.format : {};
395:     const provenance = isRecord(payload.provenance) ? payload.provenance : {};
396:     if (payload.model !== undefined && (typeof payload.model !== 'string' || !payload.model.trim())) {
397:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'model must be a non-empty string when provided' }, 400);
398:     }
399:     const model = typeof payload.model === 'string' ? payload.model.trim() : undefined;
400:     const severityThresholdValue =
401:       typeof policy.severityThreshold === 'string' ? policy.severityThreshold.trim() : policy.severityThreshold;
402:     if (severityThresholdValue !== undefined && !isSeverityThreshold(severityThresholdValue)) {
403:       return jsonResponse(
404:         {
405:           error: 'Invalid policy.severityThreshold',
406:           code: 'invalid_review_policy',
407:           allowedSeverityThresholds: ['low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical'],
408:         },
409:         400
410:       );
411:     }
412:     const { requestPayload, idempotencyPayload } = buildReviewRequestPayload({
413:       workspaceId,
414:       deploymentId,
415:       policy,
416:       format,
417:       provenance,
418:       model,
419:     });
420:     const sanitizedRequestPayload = stripSensitiveTokenFields(requestPayload) as Record<string, unknown>;
421: 
422:     const requestPayloadSha256 = await sha256Hex(JSON.stringify(idempotencyPayload));
423:     const requestPayloadSha256Aliases: string[] = [];
424:     if (!hasExtendedReviewIdempotencyInputs({ provenance, model })) {
425:       const legacyRequestPayloadSha256 = await sha256Hex(
426:         JSON.stringify(buildLegacyReviewRequestPayload({ workspaceId, deploymentId, policy, format }))
427:       );
428:       if (legacyRequestPayloadSha256 !== requestPayloadSha256) {
429:         requestPayloadSha256Aliases.push(legacyRequestPayloadSha256);
430:       }
431:     }
432:     const existingReview = await getReviewRunByIdempotency(
433:       env.DB,
434:       workspaceId,
435:       idempotencyKey,
436:       requestPayloadSha256,
437:       requestPayloadSha256Aliases
438:     );
439:     if (existingReview) {
440:       const created = { review: existingReview, reused: true };
441: 
442:       if (created.review.status === 'queued') {
443:         const alreadyEnqueued = await hasReviewEvent(env.DB, created.review.id, 'review_enqueued');
444:         const shouldReenqueueRecoveredReview =
445:           created.reused && (created.review.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled' || created.review.attemptCount > 0);
446:         if (!alreadyEnqueued || shouldReenqueueRecoveredReview) {
447:           if (env.REVIEWS_QUEUE && workerGithubToken) {
448:             await env.REVIEWS_QUEUE.send(createReviewQueueMessage(created.review.id));
449:           } else if (reviewGithubToken && ctx) {
450:             ctx.waitUntil(
451:               runReviewInlineWithRetries(env, created.review.id, 4, {
452:                 cochangeGithubToken: reviewGithubToken,
453:               })
454:             );
455:           } else if (env.REVIEWS_QUEUE) {
456:             await env.REVIEWS_QUEUE.send(createReviewQueueMessage(created.review.id));
457:           } else if (ctx) {
458:             ctx.waitUntil(runReviewInlineWithRetries(env, created.review.id));
459:           }
460: 
461:           await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
462:             reviewId: created.review.id,
463:             eventType: 'review_enqueued',
464:             payload: {
465:               mode:
466:                 env.REVIEWS_QUEUE && workerGithubToken
467:                   ? 'queue'
468:                   : reviewGithubToken && ctx
469:                     ? 'inline'
470:                     : env.REVIEWS_QUEUE
471:                       ? 'queue'
472:                       : 'inline',
473:               reused: created.reused,
474:               recovered: shouldReenqueueRecoveredReview,
475:             },
476:           });
477:         }
478:       }
479: 
480:       return jsonResponse(
481:         {
482:           reviewId: created.review.id,
483:           status: created.review.status,
484:           eventsUrl: `/api/reviews/${created.review.id}/events`,
485:           resultUrl: `/api/reviews/${created.review.id}`,
486:         },
487:         200
488:       );
489:     }
490: 
491:     const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
492:     if (!workspace || workspace.status === 'deleted') {
493:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
494:     }
495: 
496:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
497:     if (!deployment) {
498:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Deployment not found' }, 404);
499:     }
500:     if (deployment.status !== 'succeeded') {
501:       return jsonResponse(
502:         {
503:           error: 'Review target deployment must be succeeded',
504:           code: 'deployment_not_reviewable',
505:         },
506:         409
507:       );
508:     }
509: 
510:     const created = await createReviewRun(env.DB, {
511:       id: generateReviewRunId(),
512:       workspaceId,
513:       deploymentId,
514:       targetType: 'workspace_deployment',
515:       mode: 'report_only',
516:       idempotencyKey,
517:       requestPayload: sanitizedRequestPayload,
518:       requestPayloadSha256,
519:       requestPayloadSha256Aliases,
520:       provenance: {
521:         promptSummary: `Review deployment ${deploymentId} for workspace ${workspaceId}`,
522:       },
523:     });
524: 
525:     if (!created.reused) {
526:       await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
527:         reviewId: created.review.id,
528:         eventType: 'review_created',
529:         payload: {
530:           workspaceId,
531:           deploymentId,
532:           mode: 'report_only',
533:         },
534:       });
535:     }
536: 
537:     if (created.review.status === 'queued') {
538:       const alreadyEnqueued = await hasReviewEvent(env.DB, created.review.id, 'review_enqueued');
539:       const shouldReenqueueRecoveredReview =
540:         created.reused && (created.review.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled' || created.review.attemptCount > 0);
541:       if (!alreadyEnqueued || shouldReenqueueRecoveredReview) {
542:         if (env.REVIEWS_QUEUE && workerGithubToken) {
543:           await env.REVIEWS_QUEUE.send(createReviewQueueMessage(created.review.id));
544:         } else if (reviewGithubToken && ctx) {
545:           ctx.waitUntil(
546:             runReviewInlineWithRetries(env, created.review.id, 4, {
547:               cochangeGithubToken: reviewGithubToken,
548:             })
549:           );
550:         } else if (env.REVIEWS_QUEUE) {
551:           await env.REVIEWS_QUEUE.send(createReviewQueueMessage(created.review.id));
552:         } else if (ctx) {
553:           ctx.waitUntil(runReviewInlineWithRetries(env, created.review.id));
554:         }
555: 
556:         await appendReviewEvent(env.DB, {
557:           reviewId: created.review.id,
558:           eventType: 'review_enqueued',
559:           payload: {
560:             mode:
561:               env.REVIEWS_QUEUE && workerGithubToken
562:                 ? 'queue'
563:                 : reviewGithubToken && ctx
564:                   ? 'inline'
565:                   : env.REVIEWS_QUEUE
566:                     ? 'queue'
567:                     : 'inline',
568:             reused: created.reused,
569:             recovered: shouldReenqueueRecoveredReview,
570:           },
571:         });
572:       }
573:     }
574: 
575:     return jsonResponse(
576:       {
577:         reviewId: created.review.id,
578:         status: created.review.status,
579:         eventsUrl: `/api/reviews/${created.review.id}/events`,
580:         resultUrl: `/api/reviews/${created.review.id}`,
581:       },
582:       created.reused ? 200 : 202
583:     );
584:   } catch (error) {
585:     if (error instanceof ReviewIdempotencyConflictError) {
586:       return jsonResponse(
587:         {
588:           error: 'Idempotency key has already been used with different payload',
589:           code: 'idempotency_key_conflict',
590:         },
591:         409
592:       );
593:     }
594: 
595:     if (error instanceof SyntaxError) {
596:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
597:     }
598: 
599:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
600:     return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to create review: ${message}` }, 500);
601:   }
602: }

613: export async function handleGetReviewEvents(reviewId: string, request: Request, env: Env): Promise<Response> {
614:   try {
615:     const review = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
616:     if (!review) {
617:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Review not found' }, 404);
618:     }
619: 
620:     const fromSeq = resolveFromSequence(request);
621:     const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
622:       async start(controller) {
623:         const encoder = new TextEncoder();
624:         try {
625:           let cursor = fromSeq;
626:           let currentStatus = review.status;
627:           let lastHeartbeatAt = Date.now();
628:           let sawTerminalEvent = false;
629:           let terminalGraceDeadline: number | null = null;
630: 
631:           const isTerminalEventType = (eventType: string): boolean => {
632:             return eventType === 'review_succeeded' || eventType === 'review_failed' || eventType === 'review_cancelled';
633:           };
634: 
635:           const write = (chunk: string): void => {
636:             controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk));
637:           };
638: 
639:           const writePersistedEvents = async (): Promise<void> => {
640:             const persistedEvents = await listReviewEvents(env.DB, reviewId, cursor);
641:             for (const item of persistedEvents) {
642:               cursor = item.seq;
643:               if (isTerminalEventType(item.eventType)) {
644:                 sawTerminalEvent = true;
645:               }
646:               write(
647:                 formatSseDataWithId(item.seq, {
648:                   type: item.eventType,
649:                   reviewId,
650:                   seq: item.seq,
651:                   createdAt: item.createdAt,
652:                   ...(isRecord(item.payload) ? item.payload : { value: item.payload }),
653:                 })
654:               );
655:             }
656:           };
657: 
658:           await writePersistedEvents();
659:           write(
660:             formatSseData({
661:               type: 'snapshot',
662:               reviewId,
663:               status: currentStatus,
664:             })
665:           );
666: 
667:           while (currentStatus === 'queued' || currentStatus === 'running') {
668:             await sleep(REVIEW_STREAM_POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
669:             await writePersistedEvents();
670: 
671:             const latest = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
672:             if (!latest) {
673:               write(
674:                 formatSseData({
675:                   type: 'error',
676:                   reviewId,
677:                   message: 'Review not found during event stream',
678:                 })
679:               );
680:               break;
681:             }
682: 
683:             currentStatus = latest.status;
684:             if (currentStatus !== 'queued' && currentStatus !== 'running' && terminalGraceDeadline === null) {
685:               terminalGraceDeadline = Date.now() + REVIEW_TERMINAL_EVENT_GRACE_MS;
686:             }
687:             if (currentStatus !== 'queued' && currentStatus !== 'running' && sawTerminalEvent) {
688:               break;
689:             }
690:             if (terminalGraceDeadline !== null && Date.now() >= terminalGraceDeadline) {
691:               break;
692:             }
693:             if (Date.now() - lastHeartbeatAt >= REVIEW_STREAM_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_MS) {
694:               write(
695:                 formatSseData({
696:                   type: 'heartbeat',
697:                   reviewId,
698:                   status: currentStatus,
699:                 })
700:               );
701:               lastHeartbeatAt = Date.now();

1699: export async function runReviewInlineWithRetries(
1700:   env: Env,
1701:   reviewId: string,

1703:   options?: ReviewRunExecutionOptions
1704: ): Promise<void> {

1707:       await processReviewRun(env, reviewId, options);
1708:     } catch {
1709:       // Retry scheduling is inferred from persisted status.
1710:     }

1713:     if (!latest) {
1714:       return;
1715:     }
1716:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
1717:       return;
1718:     }
1719:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
1720:       return;
1721:     }
1722:   }
1723: 
1724:   const latest = await getReviewRun(env.DB, reviewId);
1725:   if (latest?.status === 'queued' && latest.error?.code === 'retry_scheduled') {
1726:     const message = `Review ${reviewId} remained queued after inline retries`;
1727:     await replaceReviewFindings(env.DB, reviewId, []);

1740:       },
1741:     });
1742:   }
1743: }

1748:   }

377:   return response.json() as Promise<ReviewCreateResponse>;
378: }
379: 
380: export async function getReview(workerUrl: string, reviewId: string): Promise<ReviewGetResponse> {
381:   const response = await fetch(`${workerUrl}/api/reviews/${reviewId}`);
382:   if (!response.ok) {
383:     const errorText = await response.text();
384:     throw new Error(`Worker error (${response.status}): ${errorText}`);
385:   }
386: 
387:   return response.json() as Promise<ReviewGetResponse>;
388: }
389: 
390: function parseSseChunk(chunk: string): ReviewEventEnvelope[] {
391:   const messages = chunk.split('\n\n');
392:   const events: ReviewEventEnvelope[] = [];
393: 
394:   for (const message of messages) {
395:     const trimmed = message.trim();
396:     if (!trimmed) {
397:       continue;
398:     }
399: 
400:     let id: string | null = null;
401:     const dataLines: string[] = [];
402:     for (const line of trimmed.split('\n')) {
403:       if (line.startsWith('id:')) {
404:         id = line.slice(3).trim();
405:         continue;
406:       }
407:       if (line.startsWith('data:')) {
408:         dataLines.push(line.slice(5).trim());
409:       }
410:     }
411: 
412:     if (dataLines.length === 0) {
413:       continue;
414:     }
415: 
416:     const payload = dataLines.join('\n');
417:     try {
418:       events.push({
419:         id,
420:         data: JSON.parse(payload) as Record<string, unknown>,
421:       });
422:     } catch {
423:       for (const dataLine of dataLines) {
424:         events.push({
425:           id,
426:           data: JSON.parse(dataLine) as Record<string, unknown>,
427:         });
428:       }
429:     }
430:   }
431: 
432:   return events;
433: }
434: 
435: export async function streamReviewEvents(
436:   workerUrl: string,
437:   reviewId: string,
438:   onEvent: (event: ReviewEventEnvelope) => void | Promise<void>
439: ): Promise<void> {
440:   const response = await fetch(`${workerUrl}/api/reviews/${reviewId}/events`, {
441:     headers: {
442:       Accept: 'text/event-stream',
443:     },
444:   });
445: 
446:   if (!response.ok) {
447:     const errorText = await response.text();
448:     throw new Error(`Worker error (${response.status}): ${errorText}`);
449:   }
450: 
451:   if (!response.body) {
452:     const bodyText = await response.text();
453:     for (const event of parseSseChunk(bodyText)) {
454:       await onEvent(event);
455:     }
456:     return;
457:   }
458: 
459:   const decoder = new TextDecoder();
460:   const reader = response.body.getReader();
461:   let buffer = '';
462: 
463:   while (true) {
464:     const { done, value } = await reader.read();
465:     if (done) {
466:       break;
467:     }
468: 
469:     buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
470:     const parts = buffer.split('\n\n');
471:     buffer = parts.pop() ?? '';
472:     for (const part of parts) {
473:       for (const event of parseSseChunk(part)) {
474:         await onEvent(event);
475:       }
476:     }
477:   }
478: 
479:   buffer += decoder.decode();
480:   for (const event of parseSseChunk(buffer)) {
481:     await onEvent(event);
482:   }
483: }

(End of file - total 483 lines)
</content>

23: async function getTableColumns(env: Env, tableName: string): Promise<string[]> {
24:   const result = await env.DB.prepare(`PRAGMA table_info(${tableName})`).all<Record<string, unknown>>();
25:   const rows = Array.isArray(result.results) ? result.results : [];
26:   return rows
27:     .map((row) => (typeof row.name === 'string' ? row.name : null))
28:     .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value));
29: }
30: 
31: async function tableExists(env: Env, tableName: string): Promise<boolean> {
32:   const record = await env.DB.prepare('SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = ? AND name = ? LIMIT 1')
33:     .bind('table', tableName)
34:     .first<{ name: string }>();
35:   return Boolean(record?.name);
36: }

38: export async function handleGetDeployReadiness(env: Env): Promise<Response> {
39:   const checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }> = [];

45:   });
46:

48:   const requiredDeploymentColumns = [
49:     'toolchain_json',
50:     'dependency_cache_key',
51:     'dependency_cache_hit',
52:     'remediations_json',
53:   ];
54:   const missingDeploymentColumns = requiredDeploymentColumns.filter((column) => !deploymentsColumns.includes(column));
55:   checks.push({
56:     code: 'migration_workspace_deployments_0008',
57:     ok: missingDeploymentColumns.length === 0,
58:     details:
59:       missingDeploymentColumns.length === 0
60:         ? 'all phase 6 columns present'
61:         : `missing columns: ${missingDeploymentColumns.join(', ')}`,
62:   });
63:

65:   checks.push({

83:       checks,

89:   try {

91:     checks.push(...providerChecks);

94:     checks.push({ code: providerError.code, ok: false, details: providerError.message });
95:   }
96:

98:     ok: checks.every((check) => check.ok),
99:     checks,
100:   });

288:   async queue(batch: MessageBatch<unknown>, env: Env): Promise<void> {
289:     for (const message of batch.messages) {
290:       const body = message.body as Record<string, unknown> | null;
291:       const type = typeof body?.type === 'string' ? body.type : '';
292: 
293:       if (type === 'workspace_task_created') {
294:         let payload;
295:         try {
296:           payload = parseWorkspaceTaskQueueMessage(message.body);
297:         } catch (error) {
298:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
299:           console.error(`[workspace-task-queue] invalid message dropped: ${details}`);
300:           continue;
301:         }
302: 
303:         try {
304:           await processWorkspaceTask(env, payload.workspaceId, payload.taskId);
305:         } catch (error) {
306:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
307:           console.error(`[workspace-task-queue] message handling failed: ${details}`);
308:           if (shouldRetryWorkspaceTaskError(error)) {
309:             message.retry();
310:           }
311:         }
312:         continue;
313:       }
314: 
315:       if (type === 'workspace_deployment_requested') {
316:         let payload;
317:         try {
318:           payload = parseWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage(message.body);
319:         } catch (error) {
320:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
321:           console.error(`[workspace-deploy-queue] invalid message dropped: ${details}`);
322:           continue;
323:         }
324: 
325:         try {
326:           await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, payload.workspaceId, payload.deploymentId);
327:         } catch (error) {
328:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
329:           console.error(`[workspace-deploy-queue] message handling failed: ${details}`);
330:           if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
331:             message.retry();
332:           }
333:         }
334:         continue;
335:       }
336: 
337:       if (type === 'review_requested') {
338:         let payload;
339:         try {
340:           payload = parseReviewQueueMessage(message.body);
341:         } catch (error) {
342:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
343:           console.error(`[review-queue] invalid message dropped: ${details}`);
344:           continue;
345:         }
346: 
347:         try {
348:           await processReviewRun(env, payload.reviewId);
349:         } catch (error) {
350:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
351:           console.error(`[review-queue] message handling failed: ${details}`);
352:           if (shouldRetryReviewError(error)) {
353:             message.retry();
354:           }
355:         }
356:         continue;
357:       }
358: 
359:       let checkpointPayload;
360:       try {
361:         checkpointPayload = parseCheckpointJobQueueMessage(message.body);
362:       } catch (error) {
363:         const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
364:         console.error(`[checkpoint-queue] invalid message dropped: ${details}`);
365:         continue;
366:       }
367: 
368:       try {
369:         await processCheckpointJob(env, checkpointPayload.jobId);
370:       } catch (error) {
371:         const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
372:         console.error(`[checkpoint-queue] message handling failed: ${details}`);
373:         message.retry();
374:       }
375:     }
376:   },
377: };

(End of file - total 377 lines)

469: function parseJsonOrFallback(value: string | null, fallback: unknown): unknown {
470:   if (!value) {
471:     return fallback;
472:   }
473: 
474:   try {
475:     return JSON.parse(value);
476:   } catch {
477:     return fallback;
478:   }
479: }
480: 
481: const GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN = /\bgh[psu]_[A-Za-z0-9_]{20,}\b/g;
482: const GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN_TEST = /\bgh[psu]_[A-Za-z0-9_]{20,}\b/;
483: 
484: function stripSensitiveTokenFields(value: unknown): unknown {
485:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
486:     return value.map((item) => stripSensitiveTokenFields(item));
487:   }
488:   if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') {
489:     if (typeof value === 'string' && GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN_TEST.test(value)) {
490:       return value.replace(GITHUB_TOKEN_PATTERN, '[REDACTED_TOKEN]');
491:     }
492:     return value;
493:   }
494:   const record = value as Record<string, unknown>;
495:   return Object.entries(record).reduce<Record<string, unknown>>((result, [key, nested]) => {
496:     const normalizedKey = key.toLowerCase();
497:     if (
498:       normalizedKey === 'x-review-github-token' ||
499:       normalizedKey === 'review_context_github_token' ||
500:       normalizedKey === 'authorization'
501:     ) {
502:       return result;
503:     }
504:     result[key] = stripSensitiveTokenFields(nested);
505:     return result;
506:   }, {});
507: }

522:   };
523: 
524:   if (result !== undefined) {
525:     response.result = result;
526:   }
527:   if (Array.isArray(warnings) && warnings.length > 0) {
528:     response.warnings = warnings;
529:   }
530:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
531:     response.error = {
532:       code: record.error_code,
533:       message: record.error_message,
534:       details: errorDetails,
535:     };
536:   }
537: 
538:   return response;

641: function toReviewFindingRecord(value: unknown): ReviewFinding[] {
642:   if (!Array.isArray(value)) {
643:     return [];
644:   }
645: 
646:   // Phase 2 contract: strict V2 query surfaces intentionally exclude legacy finding shapes.
647:   // We do not attempt semantic V1->V2 conversion at read time because legacy reports were
648:   // generated without full ReviewContext and are not trustworthy for canonical V2 semantics.
649:   return value.flatMap((item) => {
650:     const record = item && typeof item === 'object' && !Array.isArray(item) ? (item as Record<string, unknown>) : null;
651:     if (!record) {
652:       return [];
653:     }
654: 
655:     const severity = typeof record.severity === 'string' ? record.severity.trim() : '';
656:     const category = typeof record.category === 'string' ? record.category.trim() : '';
657:     const passType = typeof record.passType === 'string' ? record.passType.trim() : '';
658:     const description = typeof record.description === 'string' ? record.description.trim() : '';
659:     const suggestedFix = typeof record.suggestedFix === 'string' ? record.suggestedFix.trim() : '';
660:     if (!severity || !category || !passType || !description) {
661:       return [];
662:     }
663: 
664:     if (!['info', 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical'].includes(severity)) {
665:       return [];
666:     }
667:     if (!['security', 'logic', 'style', 'breaking-change'].includes(category)) {
668:       return [];
669:     }
670:     if (passType !== 'single') {
671:       return [];
672:     }
673: 
674:     const locationsRaw = Array.isArray(record.locations) ? record.locations : [];
675:     const locations = locationsRaw.flatMap((locationItem) => {
676:       const location =
677:         locationItem && typeof locationItem === 'object' && !Array.isArray(locationItem)
678:           ? (locationItem as Record<string, unknown>)
679:           : null;
680:       if (!location) {
681:         return [];
682:       }
683: 
684:       const filePath = typeof location.filePath === 'string' ? location.filePath.trim() : '';
685:       if (!filePath) {
686:         return [];
687:       }
688:       const startLine = location.startLine;
689:       const endLine = location.endLine;
690:       const nullRange = startLine === null && endLine === null;
691:       const numericRange =
692:         typeof startLine === 'number' &&
693:         Number.isInteger(startLine) &&
694:         startLine > 0 &&
695:         typeof endLine === 'number' &&
696:         Number.isInteger(endLine) &&
697:         endLine >= startLine;
698:       if (!nullRange && !numericRange) {
699:         return [];
700:       }
701: 
702:       return [
703:         {
704:           filePath,
705:           startLine: nullRange ? null : (startLine as number),
706:           endLine: nullRange ? null : (endLine as number),
707:         },
708:       ];
709:     });
710: 
711:     if (locations.length === 0) {
712:       return [];
713:     }
714: 
715:     return [
716:       {
717:         severity: severity as ReviewFinding['severity'],
718:         category: category as ReviewFinding['category'],
719:         passType: passType as ReviewFinding['passType'],
720:         locations,
721:         description,
722:         suggestedFix,
723:       },
724:     ];
725:   });
726: }

728: function toReviewRunResponse(record: ReviewRunRecord): ReviewRunResponse {
729:   const provenance = parseJsonOrFallback(record.provenance_json, {});
730:   const report = parseJsonOrFallback(record.report_json, null) as ReviewReport | null;
731:   const reportHasProvenance = Boolean(report?.provenance);
732: 
733:   const response: ReviewRunResponse = {
734:     id: record.id,
735:     workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
736:     deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
737:     target: {
738:       type: record.target_type,
739:       workspaceId: record.workspace_id,
740:       deploymentId: record.deployment_id,
741:     },
742:     mode: record.mode,
743:     status: record.status,
744:     idempotencyKey: record.idempotency_key,
745:     attemptCount: record.attempt_count,
746:     startedAt: record.started_at,
747:     finishedAt: record.finished_at,
748:     createdAt: record.created_at,
749:     updatedAt: record.updated_at,
750:     findings: toReviewFindingRecord(report?.findings),
751:     evidence: Array.isArray(report?.evidence) ? report.evidence : [],
752:     provenance: {
753:       sessionIds:
754:         report?.provenance && Array.isArray(report.provenance.sessionIds) ? report.provenance.sessionIds : [],
755:       promptSummary:
756:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.promptSummary === 'string'
757:           ? report.provenance.promptSummary
758:           : !reportHasProvenance && typeof (provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary === 'string'
759:             ? ((provenance as Record<string, unknown>).promptSummary as string)
760:             : null,
761:       transcriptUrl:
762:         report?.provenance && typeof report.provenance.transcriptUrl === 'string'
763:           ? report.provenance.transcriptUrl
764:           : null,
765:       reviewContextRef:
766:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.reviewContextRef && typeof report.provenance.reviewContextRef === 'object'
767:           ? (report.provenance.reviewContextRef as ReviewContextRef)
768:           : null,
769:       reviewContextStats:
770:         report?.provenance && report.provenance.reviewContextStats && typeof report.provenance.reviewContextStats === 'object'
771:           ? report.provenance.reviewContextStats
772:           : undefined,
773:     },
774:     markdownSummary: record.markdown_summary,
775:   };
776: 
777:   if (report?.summary) {
778:     response.summary = report.summary;
779:   }
780:   if (typeof report?.summaryText === 'string') {
781:     response.summaryText = report.summaryText;
782:   }
783:   if (typeof report?.furtherPassesLowYield === 'boolean') {
784:     response.furtherPassesLowYield = report.furtherPassesLowYield;
785:   }
786:   if (report?.intent) {
787:     response.intent = report.intent;
788:   }
789:   if (record.error_code && record.error_message) {
790:     response.error = {
791:       code: record.error_code,
792:       message: record.error_message,
793:     };
794:   }
795: 
796:   return response;
797: }

799: /**
800:  * Create a new checkpoint job in the database
801:  */
802: export async function createCheckpointJob(
803:   db: D1Database,
804:   input: CreateCheckpointJobInput
805: ): Promise<JobResponse> {
806:   const result = await db
807:     .prepare(
808:       `INSERT INTO jobs (
809:          id,
810:          prompt,
811:          model,
812:          status,
813:          phase,
814:          source_type,
815:          checkpoint_id,
816:          commit_sha,
817:          source_ref,
818:          source_project_root,
819:          build_run_tests_if_present,
820:          build_run_lint_if_present,
821:          source_bundle_key,
822:          source_bundle_sha256,
823:          source_bundle_bytes
824:        )
825:        VALUES (?, ?, 'checkpoint', 'queued', 'queued', 'checkpoint', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
826:        RETURNING *`
827:     )
828:     .bind(
829:       input.id,
830:       input.prompt,
831:       input.checkpointId,
832:       input.commitSha,
833:       input.sourceRef ?? null,
834:       input.sourceProjectRoot ?? null,
835:       input.buildRunTestsIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
836:       input.buildRunLintIfPresent ? 1 : 0,
837:       input.sourceBundleKey,
838:       input.sourceBundleSha256,
839:       input.sourceBundleBytes
840:     )
841:     .first<JobRecord>();
842: 
843:   if (!result) {
844:     throw new Error('Failed to create checkpoint job');
845:   }
846: 
847:   return toJobResponse(result);
848: }

885: /**
886:  * Atomically claim a queued checkpoint job for execution.
887:  * Returns true when claim succeeds, false when another worker already claimed.
888:  */
889: export async function claimQueuedCheckpointJob(db: D1Database, id: string): Promise<boolean> {
890:   const result = await db
891:     .prepare(
892:       `UPDATE jobs
893:        SET status = 'running',
894:            phase = 'building',
895:            started_at = ?,
896:            error_message = NULL,
897:            error_code = NULL
898:        WHERE id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
899:     )
900:     .bind(new Date().toISOString(), id)
901:     .run();
902: 
903:   const changes = Number((result as { meta?: { changes?: number } }).meta?.changes ?? 0);
904:   return changes > 0;
905: }

907: /**
908:  * Append a sequenced job event and return its sequence number.
909:  */
910: export async function appendJobEvent(
911:   db: D1Database,
912:   input: {
913:     jobId: string;
914:     attemptNo?: number;
915:     eventType: string;
916:     phase: JobPhase;
917:     payload: unknown;
918:   }
919: ): Promise<number> {
920:   const sequenceResult = await db
921:     .prepare('UPDATE jobs SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
922:     .bind(input.jobId)
923:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
924: 
925:   if (!sequenceResult) {
926:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for job ${input.jobId}`);
927:   }
928: 
929:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
930:   await db
931:     .prepare(
932:       `INSERT INTO job_events (job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json)
933:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
934:     )
935:     .bind(
936:       input.jobId,
937:       input.attemptNo ?? 0,
938:       seq,
939:       input.eventType,
940:       input.phase,
941:       JSON.stringify(input.payload)
942:     )
943:     .run();
944: 
945:   return seq;
946: }

948: /**
949:  * List persisted job events from a given sequence.
950:  */
951: export async function listJobEvents(
952:   db: D1Database,
953:   jobId: string,
954:   fromExclusive = 0,
955:   limit = 500
956: ): Promise<JobEventItem[]> {
957:   const result = await db
958:     .prepare(
959:       `SELECT id, job_id, attempt_no, seq, event_type, phase, payload_json, created_at
960:        FROM job_events
961:        WHERE job_id = ? AND seq > ?
962:        ORDER BY seq ASC
963:        LIMIT ?`
964:     )
965:     .bind(jobId, fromExclusive, limit)
966:     .all<JobEventRecord>();
967: 
968:   return result.results.map((row) => {
969:     let payload: unknown;
970:     try {
971:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
972:     } catch {
973:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
974:     }
975: 
976:     return {
977:       seq: row.seq,
978:       eventType: row.event_type,
979:       phase: row.phase,
980:       payload,
981:       createdAt: row.created_at,
982:     };
983:   });
984: }

986: /**
987:  * Update job status
988:  */
989: export async function updateJobStatus(
990:   db: D1Database,
991:   id: string,
992:   status: JobStatus,
993:   additionalFields?: {
994:     phase?: JobPhase;
995:     started_at?: string | null;
996:     completed_at?: string | null;
997:     cancel_requested_at?: string | null;
998:     cancelled_at?: string | null;
999:     preview_url?: string;
1000:     deployed_url?: string;
1001:     code_url?: string;
1002:     code_zip_url?: string;
1003:     error_message?: string | null;
1004:     error_code?: string | null;
1005:     retry_count?: number;
1006:     file_count?: number;
1007:     // Metrics fields
1008:     prompt_tokens?: number;
1009:     completion_tokens?: number;
1010:     total_tokens?: number;
1011:     cost?: number;
1012:     llm_latency_ms?: number;
1013:     install_duration_ms?: number;
1014:     build_duration_ms?: number;
1015:     deploy_duration_ms?: number;
1016:     total_duration_ms?: number;
1017:     lines_of_code?: number;
1018:   }
1019: ): Promise<void> {
1020:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?'];
1021:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status];
1022: 
1023:   if (additionalFields) {
1024:     if (additionalFields.phase !== undefined) {
1025:       updates.push('phase = ?');
1026:       values.push(additionalFields.phase);
1027:     }
1028:     if (additionalFields.started_at !== undefined) {

1200: /**
1201:  * Update workspace status and selected metadata.
1202:  */
1203: export async function updateWorkspaceStatus(
1204:   db: D1Database,
1205:   id: string,
1206:   status: WorkspaceStatus,
1207:   additionalFields?: {
1208:     baseline_ready?: number;
1209:     deleted_at?: string | null;
1210:     error_code?: string | null;
1211:     error_message?: string | null;
1212:   },
1213:   options?: {
1214:     ifNotDeleted?: boolean;
1215:   }
1216: ): Promise<boolean> {
1217:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1218:   const values: (string | number | null)[] = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1219: 
1220:   if (additionalFields) {
1221:     if (additionalFields.baseline_ready !== undefined) {
1222:       updates.push('baseline_ready = ?');
1223:       values.push(additionalFields.baseline_ready);
1224:     }
1225:     if (additionalFields.deleted_at !== undefined) {
1226:       updates.push('deleted_at = ?');
1227:       values.push(additionalFields.deleted_at);
1228:     }
1229:     if (additionalFields.error_code !== undefined) {
1230:       updates.push('error_code = ?');
1231:       values.push(additionalFields.error_code);
1232:     }
1233:     if (additionalFields.error_message !== undefined) {
1234:       updates.push('error_message = ?');
1235:       values.push(additionalFields.error_message);
1236:     }
1237:   }
1238: 
1239:   values.push(id);
1240: 
1241:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
1242:   if (options?.ifNotDeleted) {
1243:     whereClause += " AND status != 'deleted'";
1244:   }
1245: 
1246:   const result = await db
1247:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspaces SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
1248:     .bind(...values)
1249:     .run();
1250: 
1251:   return Number(result.meta.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1252: }

1301: /**
1302:  * Append a sequenced workspace event and return sequence number.
1303:  */
1304: export async function appendWorkspaceEvent(
1305:   db: D1Database,
1306:   input: {
1307:     workspaceId: string;
1308:     eventType: string;
1309:     payload: unknown;
1310:   }
1311: ): Promise<number> {
1312:   const sequenceResult = await db
1313:     .prepare('UPDATE workspaces SET last_event_seq = last_event_seq + 1 WHERE id = ? RETURNING last_event_seq')
1314:     .bind(input.workspaceId)
1315:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
1316: 
1317:   if (!sequenceResult) {
1318:     throw new Error(`Failed to allocate event sequence for workspace ${input.workspaceId}`);
1319:   }
1320: 
1321:   const seq = Number(sequenceResult.last_event_seq);
1322:   await db
1323:     .prepare(
1324:       `INSERT INTO workspace_events (workspace_id, seq, event_type, payload_json)
1325:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`
1326:     )
1327:     .bind(input.workspaceId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))
1328:     .run();
1329: 
1330:   return seq;
1331: }

1333: /**
1334:  * List persisted workspace events from a given sequence.
1335:  */
1336: export async function listWorkspaceEvents(
1337:   db: D1Database,
1338:   workspaceId: string,
1339:   fromExclusive = 0,
1340:   limit = 500
1341: ): Promise<WorkspaceEventItem[]> {
1342:   const result = await db
1343:     .prepare(
1344:       `SELECT seq, event_type, payload_json, created_at
1345:        FROM workspace_events
1346:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND seq > ?
1347:        ORDER BY seq ASC
1348:        LIMIT ?`
1349:     )
1350:     .bind(workspaceId, fromExclusive, limit)
1351:     .all<WorkspaceEventRecord>();
1352: 
1353:   return result.results.map((row) => {
1354:     let payload: unknown;
1355:     try {
1356:       payload = JSON.parse(row.payload_json);
1357:     } catch {
1358:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };
1359:     }
1360: 
1361:     return {
1362:       seq: row.seq,
1363:       eventType: row.event_type,
1364:       payload,
1365:       createdAt: row.created_at,
1366:     };
1367:   });
1368: }

1370: export async function createWorkspaceOperation(
1371:   db: D1Database,
1372:   input: CreateWorkspaceOperationInput
1373: ): Promise<{ operation: WorkspaceOperationResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1374:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
1375:   const existingIdempotency = await db
1376:     .prepare(
1377:       `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1378:        FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1379:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1380:        LIMIT 1`
1381:     )
1382:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1383:     .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1384: 
1385:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1386:     if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1387:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1388:     }
1389: 
1390:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.operation_id);
1391:     if (!existingOperation) {
1392:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${existingIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1393:     }
1394:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1395:   }
1396: 
1397:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1398:     await db
1399:       .prepare(
1400:         `DELETE FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1401:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?`
1402:       )
1403:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1404:       .run();
1405:   }
1406: 
1407:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1408:   const operationId = input.id;
1409: 
1410:   const operationRecord = await db
1411:     .prepare(
1412:       `INSERT INTO workspace_operations (
1413:          id,
1414:          workspace_id,
1415:          type,
1416:          status,
1417:          actor_id,
1418:          auth_principal_json,
1419:          request_payload_json,
1420:          request_payload_sha256,
1421:          idempotency_key,
1422:          warnings_json
1423:        )
1424:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '[]')
1425:        RETURNING *`
1426:     )
1427:     .bind(
1428:       operationId,
1429:       input.workspaceId,
1430:       input.type,
1431:       input.actorId ?? null,
1432:       JSON.stringify(input.authPrincipal ?? {}),
1433:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1434:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
1435:       input.idempotencyKey
1436:     )
1437:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1438: 
1439:   if (!operationRecord) {
1440:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace operation');
1441:   }
1442: 
1443:   try {
1444:     await db
1445:       .prepare(
1446:         `INSERT INTO workspace_operation_idempotency (
1447:            id,
1448:            workspace_id,
1449:            operation_type,
1450:            idempotency_key,
1451:            operation_id,
1452:            request_payload_sha256,
1453:            expires_at
1454:          )
1455:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1456:       )
1457:       .bind(
1458:         generatePrefixedId('wopk'),
1459:         input.workspaceId,
1460:         input.type,
1461:         input.idempotencyKey,
1462:         operationId,
1463:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
1464:         expiresAt
1465:       )
1466:       .run();
1467:   } catch (error) {
1468:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
1469:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1470:       throw error;
1471:     }
1472: 
1473:     const concurrentIdempotency = await db
1474:       .prepare(
1475:         `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1476:          FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1477:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1478:          LIMIT 1`
1479:       )
1480:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1481:       .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1482: 
1483:     if (!concurrentIdempotency || concurrentIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1484:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1485:       throw new Error('Idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1486:     }
1487:     if (concurrentIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1488:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1489:       throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1490:     }
1491: 
1492:     const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, concurrentIdempotency.operation_id);
1493:     if (!existingOperation) {
1494:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1495:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${concurrentIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1496:     }
1497:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1498:     return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1499:   }
1500: 
1501:   return { operation: toWorkspaceOperationResponse(operationRecord), reused: false };
1502: }
1503: 
1504: export async function getWorkspaceOperation(
1505:   db: D1Database,
1506:   workspaceId: string,
1507:   operationId: string
1508: ): Promise<WorkspaceOperationResponse | null> {
1509:   const result = await db
1510:     .prepare('SELECT * FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ?')
1511:     .bind(operationId, workspaceId)
1512:     .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1513: 
1514:   if (!result) {
1515:     return null;
1516:   }
1517: 
1518:   return toWorkspaceOperationResponse(result);
1519: }

1521: export async function claimWorkspaceOperationForExecution(
1522:   db: D1Database,
1523:   workspaceId: string,
1524:   operationId: string
1525: ): Promise<boolean> {
1526:   const startedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1527:   const result = await db
1528:     .prepare(
1529:       `UPDATE workspace_operations
1530:        SET status = 'running',
1531:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
1532:            updated_at = ?
1533:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
1534:     )
1535:     .bind(startedAt, startedAt, operationId, workspaceId)
1536:     .run();
1537: 
1538:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
1539: }

1541: export async function updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(
1542:   db: D1Database,
1543:   operationId: string,
1544:   status: WorkspaceOperationStatus,
1545:   options?: {
1546:     result?: unknown;
1547:     warnings?: unknown[];
1548:     errorCode?: string | null;
1549:     errorClass?: string | null;
1550:     errorMessage?: string | null;
1551:     errorDetails?: unknown;
1552:     startedAt?: string | null;
1553:     finishedAt?: string | null;
1554:   }
1555: ): Promise<void> {
1556:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1557:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1558: 
1559:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1560:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
1561:     values.push(options.startedAt);
1562:   }
1563:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1564:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1565:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
1566:   }
1567:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1568:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
1569:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1570:   }
1571:   if (options?.warnings !== undefined) {
1572:     updates.push('warnings_json = ?');
1573:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.warnings));
1574:   }
1575:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1576:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
1577:     values.push(options.errorCode);
1578:   }
1579:   if (options?.errorClass !== undefined) {
1580:     updates.push('error_class = ?');
1581:     values.push(options.errorClass);
1582:   }
1583:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
1584:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
1585:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
1586:   }
1587:   if (options?.errorDetails !== undefined) {
1588:     updates.push('error_details_json = ?');
1589:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.errorDetails));
1590:   }
1591:   if (status === 'running') {
1592:     updates.push('started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?)');
1593:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1594:   }
1595:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed') {
1596:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
1597:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1598:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL OR COALESCE(finished_at, ?) IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(COALESCE(finished_at, ?)) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
1599:     const finishedAtForDuration = new Date().toISOString();
1600:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration, finishedAtForDuration);
1601:   }
1602: 
1603:   values.push(operationId);
1604: 
1605:   await db
1606:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_operations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1607:     .bind(...values)
1608:     .run();
1609: }
1610: 
1611: export async function createWorkspaceArtifact(
1612:   db: D1Database,
1613:   input: CreateWorkspaceArtifactInput
1614: ): Promise<WorkspaceArtifactResponse> {
1615:   const result = await db
1616:     .prepare(
1617:       `INSERT INTO workspace_artifacts (
1618:          id,
1619:          workspace_id,
1620:          operation_id,
1621:          type,
1622:          status,
1623:          object_key,
1624:          bytes,
1625:          content_type,
1626:          sha256,
1627:          source_baseline_sha,
1628:          creator_id,
1629:          retention_expires_at,
1630:          warnings_json,
1631:          metadata_json
1632:        )
1633:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, 'available', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
1634:        RETURNING *`
1635:     )
1636:     .bind(
1637:       input.id,
1638:       input.workspaceId,
1639:       input.operationId ?? null,
1640:       input.type,
1641:       input.objectKey,
1642:       input.bytes,
1643:       input.contentType,
1644:       input.sha256,
1645:       input.sourceBaselineSha,
1646:       input.creatorId ?? null,
1647:       input.retentionExpiresAt,
1648:       JSON.stringify(input.warnings ?? []),
1649:       JSON.stringify(input.metadata ?? {})
1650:     )
1651:     .first<WorkspaceArtifactRecord>();
1652: 
1653:   if (!result) {

423:     `Co-change retrieval stats: ${JSON.stringify(context.retrieval.coChange)}`,
424:     `Review context stats: ${JSON.stringify(context.stats)}`,
425:     promptDiffSnapshot !== undefined
426:       ? `Authoritative deployed diff snapshot: ${JSON.stringify(promptDiffSnapshot)}`
427:       : 'Authoritative deployed diff snapshot: unavailable',
428:     `Initial root listing: ${JSON.stringify(input.rootListing)}`,
429:     `Initial diff snapshot: ${JSON.stringify(input.diffSnapshot)}`,
430:     '',
431:     'If you cannot justify a concrete issue, return an empty findings array with a concise summary.',
432:   ].join('\n');
433: }
434: 
435: function clampText(value: string, maxBytes: number): { text: string; truncated: boolean } {
436:   const encoder = new TextEncoder();
437:   const bytes = encoder.encode(value);
438:   if (bytes.byteLength <= maxBytes) {
439:     return { text: value, truncated: false };
440:   }
441:   const sliced = bytes.slice(0, Math.max(0, maxBytes - 3));
442:   return { text: new TextDecoder().decode(sliced) + '...', truncated: true };
443: }
444: 
445: function clampAuthoritativeDiffSnapshot(value: unknown, maxBytes: number): unknown {
446:   const record = asRecord(value);
447:   if (Object.keys(record).length === 0) {
448:     return value;
449:   }
450: 
451:   const patch = typeof record.patch === 'string' ? record.patch : null;
452:   if (!patch) {
453:     return value;
454:   }
455: 
456:   const clamped = clampText(patch, maxBytes);
457:   return {
458:     ...record,
459:     patch: clamped.text,
460:     truncated: clamped.truncated || Boolean(record.truncated),
461:   };
462: }
463: 
464: function sanitizeToolValue(value: unknown): unknown {
465:   if (typeof value === 'string') {
466:     return redactReviewText(value) ?? '';
467:   }
468:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
469:     return value.map((item) => sanitizeToolValue(item));
470:   }
471:   if (value && typeof value === 'object') {
472:     return Object.entries(value as Record<string, unknown>).reduce<Record<string, unknown>>((result, [key, nested]) => {
473:       result[key] = sanitizeToolValue(nested);
474:       return result;
475:     }, {});
476:   }
477:   return value;
478: }
479: 
480: function sanitizeToolContext(context: ReviewToolContext): ReviewToolContext {
481:   return {
482:     request: sanitizeToolValue(context.request) as Record<string, unknown>,
483:     result: sanitizeToolValue(context.result),
484:   };
485: }
486: 
487: function buildToolHistoryLabel(action: Extract<ReviewAgentAction, { type: 'tool' }>): string {
488:   return `tool:${action.tool} ${JSON.stringify(action.args)}`;
489: }
490: 
491: function buildListFilesCommand(absolutePath: string, rootPath: string): string {
492:   return `python3 - ${shellQuote(absolutePath)} ${shellQuote(rootPath)} <<'PY'
493: import json
494: import os
495: import sys
496: 
497: path = sys.argv[1]
498: root = sys.argv[2]
499: root_real = os.path.realpath(root)
500: target = path if os.path.isabs(path) else os.path.join(root, path)
501: target_real = os.path.realpath(target)
502: if os.path.commonpath([root_real, target_real]) != root_real:
503:     print(json.dumps({'error':'path_escape'}))
504:     raise SystemExit(0)
505: if not os.path.exists(target_real):
506:     print(json.dumps({'error':'not_found'}))
507:     raise SystemExit(0)
508: if not os.path.isdir(target_real):
509:     print(json.dumps({'error':'not_directory'}))
510:     raise SystemExit(0)
511: entries = []
512: for name in sorted(os.listdir(target_real)):
513:     full = os.path.join(target_real, name)
514:     entries.append({'name': name, 'type': 'directory' if os.path.isdir(full) else 'file'})
515: print(json.dumps({'entries': entries[:200]}))
516: PY`;
517: }
518: 
519: function buildReadFileCommand(absolutePath: string, maxBytes: number, rootPath: string): string {
520:   return `python3 - ${shellQuote(absolutePath)} ${maxBytes} ${shellQuote(rootPath)} <<'PY'
521: import json
522: import os
523: import sys
524: 
525: path = sys.argv[1]
526: max_bytes = int(sys.argv[2])
527: root = sys.argv[3]
528: root_real = os.path.realpath(root)
529: target = path if os.path.isabs(path) else os.path.join(root, path)
530: target_real = os.path.realpath(target)
531: if os.path.commonpath([root_real, target_real]) != root_real:
532:     print(json.dumps({'error':'path_escape'}))
533:     raise SystemExit(0)
534: if not os.path.exists(target_real):
535:     print(json.dumps({'error':'not_found'}))
536:     raise SystemExit(0)
537: if not os.path.isfile(target_real):
538:     print(json.dumps({'error':'not_file'}))
539:     raise SystemExit(0)
540: with open(target_real, 'rb') as f:
541:     data = f.read(max_bytes + 1)
542: truncated = len(data) > max_bytes
543: if truncated:
544:     data = data[:max_bytes]
545: text = data.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
546: print(json.dumps({'content': text, 'truncated': truncated, 'bytes': len(data)}))
547: PY`;
548: }
549: 
550: function assertWorkspacePath(pathInput: string, policy: ReviewCommandPolicy): string {
551:   const trimmed = (pathInput || '.').trim();
552:   const normalized = trimmed.replace(/\\/g, '/');
553:   if (normalized.includes('\u0000')) {
554:     throw new ReviewPolicyError('Path contains null bytes');
555:   }
556:   if (normalized.startsWith('/') || normalized.startsWith('..') || normalized.includes('/../')) {
557:     throw new ReviewPolicyError('Path escapes workspace root');
558:   }
559:   const collapsed = normalized
560:     .split('/')
561:     .filter((segment) => segment.length > 0 && segment !== '.')
562:     .join('/');
563:   if (collapsed.startsWith('..')) {
564:     throw new ReviewPolicyError('Path escapes workspace root');
565:   }
566:   if (collapsed === '.git' || collapsed.startsWith('.git/')) {
567:     throw new ReviewPolicyError('Access to .git is denied by policy');
568:   }
569:   return `${policy.rootPath}/${collapsed}`;
570: }
571: 
572: async function runSandboxCommand(
573:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
574:   command: string,
575:   timeout?: number
576: ): Promise<{ stdout: string; stderr: string }> {
577:   const result = await sandbox.exec(command, { timeout });
578:   if (result.exitCode !== 0) {
579:     const output = [result.stdout, result.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
580:     throw new Error(`Sandbox command failed with exit ${result.exitCode}: ${output || 'No output'}`);
581:   }
582:   return { stdout: result.stdout, stderr: result.stderr };
583: }
584: 
585: async function executeReviewTool(
586:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
587:   action: Extract<ReviewAgentAction, { type: 'tool' }>,
588:   policy: ReviewCommandPolicy,
589:   maxFileBytes: number,
590:   authoritativeDiffSnapshot?: unknown
591: ): Promise<ReviewToolContext> {
592:   if (action.tool === 'list_files') {
593:     const absolutePath = assertWorkspacePath(action.args.path ?? '.', policy);
594:     const output = await runSandboxCommand(
595:       sandbox,
596:       buildListFilesCommand(absolutePath, policy.rootPath)
597:     );
598:     return {
599:       request: { path: action.args.path ?? '.' },
600:       result: JSON.parse(output.stdout || '{}'),
601:     };
602:   }
603: 
604:   if (action.tool === 'read_file') {
605:     const absolutePath = assertWorkspacePath(action.args.path, policy);
606:     const maxBytes = typeof action.args.maxBytes === 'number' && Number.isFinite(action.args.maxBytes)
607:       ? Math.max(1, Math.min(maxFileBytes, Math.floor(action.args.maxBytes)))
608:       : maxFileBytes;
609:     const output = await runSandboxCommand(
610:       sandbox,
611:       buildReadFileCommand(absolutePath, maxBytes, policy.rootPath)
612:     );
613:     return {
614:       request: { path: action.args.path, maxBytes },
615:       result: JSON.parse(output.stdout || '{}'),
616:     };
617:   }
618: 
619:   if (action.tool === 'run_command') {
620:     return {
621:       request: { command: action.args.command, timeoutMs: action.args.timeoutMs ?? DEFAULT_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS },
622:       result: {
623:         error: 'run_command is disabled in review mode; use list_files, read_file, or diff_summary only',
624:         disabled: true,
625:       },
626:     };
627:   }
628: 
629:   if (action.tool === 'write_file') {
630:     return {
631:       request: { path: action.args.path },
632:       result: {
633:         ok: false,
634:         error: 'write_file is disabled in review mode; use read-only tools and return findings only',
635:         path: action.args.path,
636:       },
637:     };
638:   }
639: 
640:   if (authoritativeDiffSnapshot !== undefined) {
641:     const maxBytes = typeof action.args.maxBytes === 'number' && Number.isFinite(action.args.maxBytes)
642:       ? Math.max(1_024, Math.min(policy.maxOutputBytes, Math.floor(action.args.maxBytes)))
643:       : Math.min(policy.maxOutputBytes, 64_000);
644:     return {
645:       request: { maxBytes },
646:       result: clampAuthoritativeDiffSnapshot(authoritativeDiffSnapshot, maxBytes),
647:     };
648:   }
649: 
650:   return {
651:     request: { maxBytes: typeof action.args.maxBytes === 'number' ? action.args.maxBytes : undefined },
652:     result: {
653:       error: 'authoritative diff snapshot unavailable',
654:       changedFiles: [],
655:       patch: '',
656:       truncated: false,
657:     },
658:   };
659: }
660: 
661: class CloudflareAgentSdkReviewProvider implements ReviewAgentProvider {
662:   constructor(
663:     private readonly endpoint: string,
664:     private readonly authToken: string | null
665:   ) {}
666: 
667:   async next(input: {
668:     prompt: string;
669:     model: string;
670:     maxSteps: number;
671:     step: number;
672:     history: ReviewAgentHistoryEntry[];
673:   }): Promise<ReviewAgentAction> {
674:     const response = await fetch(this.endpoint, {
675:       method: 'POST',
676:       headers: {
677:         'Content-Type': 'application/json',
678:         ...(this.authToken ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${this.authToken}` } : {}),
679:       },
680:       body: JSON.stringify({
681:         mode: 'workspace_task',
682:         prompt: input.prompt,
683:         model: input.model,
684:         maxSteps: input.maxSteps,
685:         step: input.step,
686:         history: input.history,
687:       }),
688:     });
689: 
690:     if (!response.ok) {
691:       if (response.status >= 500 || response.status === 429) {
692:         throw new Error(`Review analysis provider temporarily unavailable (status ${response.status})`);
693:       }
694:       throw new Error(`Review analysis provider request failed with status ${response.status}`);
695:     }
696: 
697:     const parsed = (await response.json()) as unknown;
698:     const action = asRecord(parsed).action;
699:     return validateReviewAgentAction(action);
700:   }
701: }
702: 
703: function validateReviewAgentAction(action: unknown): ReviewAgentAction {
704:   const record = asRecord(action);
705:   if (record.type === 'final') {
706:     const summary = typeof record.summary === 'string' ? record.summary.trim() : '';
707:     if (!summary) {
708:       throw new ReviewPolicyError('Final action requires a non-empty summary');
709:     }
710:     return { type: 'final', summary };
711:   }
712:   if (record.type !== 'tool') {
713:     throw new ReviewPolicyError('Action type must be tool or final');
714:   }
715: 
716:   const tool = typeof record.tool === 'string' ? record.tool : '';
717:   const args = asRecord(record.args);
718:   switch (tool) {
719:     case 'list_files':
720:       if (args.path !== undefined && typeof args.path !== 'string') {
721:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('list_files.path must be a string when provided');
722:       }
723:       return { type: 'tool', tool, args };
724:     case 'read_file':
725:       if (typeof args.path !== 'string' || !args.path.trim()) {
726:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('read_file.path is required');
727:       }
728:       if (args.maxBytes !== undefined && (typeof args.maxBytes !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(args.maxBytes))) {
729:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('read_file.maxBytes must be a number when provided');
730:       }
731:       return { type: 'tool', tool, args: { path: args.path, maxBytes: args.maxBytes as number | undefined } };
732:     case 'write_file':
733:       if (typeof args.path !== 'string' || !args.path.trim()) {
734:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('write_file.path is required');
735:       }
736:       return { type: 'tool', tool, args: { path: args.path, content: typeof args.content === 'string' ? args.content : undefined } };
737:     case 'run_command':
738:       if (typeof args.command !== 'string' || !args.command.trim()) {
739:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('run_command.command is required');
740:       }
741:       if (args.timeoutMs !== undefined && (typeof args.timeoutMs !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(args.timeoutMs))) {
742:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('run_command.timeoutMs must be a number when provided');
743:       }
744:       return { type: 'tool', tool, args: { command: args.command, timeoutMs: args.timeoutMs as number | undefined } };
745:     case 'diff_summary':
746:       if (args.maxBytes !== undefined && (typeof args.maxBytes !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(args.maxBytes))) {
747:         throw new ReviewPolicyError('diff_summary.maxBytes must be a number when provided');
748:       }
749:       return { type: 'tool', tool, args: { maxBytes: args.maxBytes as number | undefined } };
750:     default:
751:       throw new ReviewPolicyError(`Tool '${tool}' is not supported in review mode`);
752:   }
753: }

755: async function getWorkspaceSandbox(env: Env, sandboxId: string): Promise<SandboxClient> {
756:   const { getSandbox } = await import('@cloudflare/sandbox');
757:   return getSandbox(env.Sandbox as DurableObjectNamespace<Sandbox>, sandboxId) as SandboxClient;
758: }

760: let sandboxResolver: (env: Env, sandboxId: string) => Promise<SandboxClient> = getWorkspaceSandbox;
761: 
762: export function setReviewAnalysisSandboxResolverForTests(
763:   resolver: ((env: Env, sandboxId: string) => Promise<SandboxClient>) | null
764: ): void {
765:   sandboxResolver = resolver ?? getWorkspaceSandbox;
766: }

768: async function snapshotInitialContext(sandbox: SandboxClient, maxFileBytes: number): Promise<{
769:   rootListing: unknown;
770:   diffSnapshot: unknown;
771: }> {
772:   const policy: ReviewCommandPolicy = {
773:     commandAllow: [],
774:     commandDeny: [],
775:     maxCommandTimeoutMs: MAX_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS,
776:     maxOutputBytes: DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES,
777:     rootPath: WORKSPACE_ROOT,
778:   };
779: 
780:   const rootListing = await executeReviewTool(
781:     sandbox,
782:     { type: 'tool', tool: 'list_files', args: { path: '.' } },
783:     policy,
784:     maxFileBytes
785:   );
786:   const diffSnapshot = await executeReviewTool(
787:     sandbox,
788:     { type: 'tool', tool: 'diff_summary', args: { maxBytes: 32_000 } },
789:     policy,
790:     maxFileBytes
791:   );
792:   return { rootListing, diffSnapshot };
793: }

795: export async function readWorkspaceFilesFromSourceBundle(
796:   env: Env,
797:   input: {
798:     sourceBundleKey: string;
799:     sandboxId: string;
800:     paths: string[];
801:     maxFileBytes?: number;
802:   }
803: ): Promise<ReviewSourceFileReadResult[]> {
804:   const maxFileBytes = parseIntegerString(env.REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_FILE_BYTES, DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_FILE_BYTES, 1_024, 200_000);
805:   const effectiveMaxFileBytes = typeof input.maxFileBytes === 'number' && Number.isFinite(input.maxFileBytes)
806:     ? Math.max(1_024, Math.min(maxFileBytes, Math.floor(input.maxFileBytes)))
807:     : maxFileBytes;
808: 
809:   if (!env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS && !env.SOURCE_BUNDLES) {
810:     throw new Error('WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS or SOURCE_BUNDLES binding is required for review context assembly');
811:   }
812:   const bundle =
813:     (env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null) ??
814:     (env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null);
815:   if (!bundle) {
816:     throw new Error(`Review source bundle not found: ${input.sourceBundleKey}`);
817:   }
818: 
819:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, input.sandboxId);
820:   try {
821:     await hydrateReviewSandbox(sandbox, await bundle.arrayBuffer());
822: 
823:     const policy: ReviewCommandPolicy = {
824:       commandAllow: [],
825:       commandDeny: [],
826:       maxCommandTimeoutMs: MAX_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS,
827:       maxOutputBytes: DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES,
828:       rootPath: WORKSPACE_ROOT,
829:     };
830: 
831:     const uniquePaths = Array.from(new Set(input.paths.map((path) => path.trim()).filter(Boolean)));
832:     const results: ReviewSourceFileReadResult[] = [];
833:     for (const path of uniquePaths) {
834:       const toolResult = await executeReviewTool(
835:         sandbox,
836:         { type: 'tool', tool: 'read_file', args: { path, maxBytes: effectiveMaxFileBytes } },
837:         policy,
838:         effectiveMaxFileBytes
839:       );
840:       const resultRecord = asRecord(toolResult.result);
841:       const error = typeof resultRecord.error === 'string' ? resultRecord.error : null;
842:       const content = typeof resultRecord.content === 'string' ? resultRecord.content : null;
843:       const bytes = typeof resultRecord.bytes === 'number' && Number.isFinite(resultRecord.bytes)
844:         ? Math.max(0, Math.floor(resultRecord.bytes))
845:         : 0;
846:       const truncated = Boolean(resultRecord.truncated);
847:       results.push({
848:         path,
849:         content,
850:         bytes,
851:         truncated,
852:         error,
853:       });
854:     }
855: 
856:     return results;
857:   } finally {
858:     if (typeof sandbox.destroy === 'function') {
859:       try {
860:         await sandbox.destroy();
861:       } catch {
862:         // Best-effort cleanup only.
863:       }
864:     }
865:   }
866: }
867: 
868: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentAgentAnalysis(
869:   env: Env,
870:   input: ReviewAgentPromptInput & {
871:     deploymentSandboxId: string;
872:     modelOverride?: string;
873:   }
874: ): Promise<ReviewAgentAnalysisResult | null> {
875:   const endpoint = (env.AGENT_SDK_URL ?? '').trim();
876:   if (!endpoint) {
877:     return null;
878:   }
879: 
880:   const model =
881:     readOptionalString(input.modelOverride) ??
882:     readOptionalString(env.REVIEW_MODEL) ??
883:     readOptionalString(env.AGENT_MODEL) ??
884:     DEFAULT_REVIEW_MODEL;
885:   const authToken = (env.AGENT_SDK_AUTH_TOKEN ?? '').trim() || null;
886:   const maxSteps = parseIntegerString(env.REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_STEPS, DEFAULT_REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_STEPS, 1, 12);
887:   const maxFileBytes = parseIntegerString(env.REVIEW_AGENT_MAX_FILE_BYTES, DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_FILE_BYTES, 1_024, 200_000);
888:   if (!env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS && !env.SOURCE_BUNDLES) {
889:     throw new Error('WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS or SOURCE_BUNDLES binding is required for review analysis');
890:   }
891:   const bundle =
892:     (env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS ? await env.WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null) ??
893:     (env.SOURCE_BUNDLES ? await env.SOURCE_BUNDLES.get(input.sourceBundleKey) : null);
894:   if (!bundle) {
895:     throw new Error(`Review source bundle not found: ${input.sourceBundleKey}`);
896:   }
897: 
898:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, input.deploymentSandboxId);
899:   try {
900:     await hydrateReviewSandbox(sandbox, await bundle.arrayBuffer());
901:     const { rootListing, diffSnapshot } = await snapshotInitialContext(sandbox, maxFileBytes);
902:     const prompt = buildReviewAgentPrompt(
903:       sanitizePromptInput({
904:         ...input,
905:         rootListing,
906:         diffSnapshot,
907:       })
908:     );
909:     if (input.onLifecycleEvent) {
910:       await input.onLifecycleEvent('review_analysis_prompt_built', {
911:         reviewContextId: input.reviewContext.id,
912:       });
913:     }
914: 
915:     const provider = new CloudflareAgentSdkReviewProvider(endpoint, authToken);
916:     const policy: ReviewCommandPolicy = {
917:       commandAllow: [],
918:       commandDeny: ['git ', 'rm ', 'npm ', 'pnpm ', 'yarn ', 'bun ', 'mkdir ', 'mv ', 'cp ', 'touch '],
919:       maxCommandTimeoutMs: MAX_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS,
920:       maxOutputBytes: DEFAULT_REVIEW_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES,
921:       rootPath: WORKSPACE_ROOT,
922:     };
923: 
924:     const history: ReviewAgentHistoryEntry[] = [];
925:     const usedTools: string[] = [];
926:     let finalValidationError: ReviewAgentOutputError | null = null;
927:     let repairAttempted = false;
928:     let repairSucceeded = false;
929:     let firstPassValid = false;
930:     let validationErrorCount = 0;
931:     let dedupedExactCount = 0;
932:     let fallbackApplied = false;
933:     let fallbackReason: string | null = null;
934:     for (let step = 1; step <= maxSteps; step += 1) {
935:       const action = await provider.next({
936:         prompt,
937:         model,
938:         maxSteps,
939:         step,
940:         history,
941:       });
942: 
943:       if (action.type === 'final') {
944:         if (input.onLifecycleEvent) {
945:           await input.onLifecycleEvent('review_analysis_model_output_received', {
946:             step,
947:             repairAttempted,
948:           });
949:         }
950:         try {
951:           const parsed = parseJsonOutput(action.summary);
952:           const validated = validateOutputOrThrow(parsed);
953:           firstPassValid = !repairAttempted;
954:           repairSucceeded = repairAttempted;
955:           validationErrorCount = finalValidationError?.details && Array.isArray(finalValidationError.details.errors)
956:             ? finalValidationError.details.errors.length
957:             : 0;
958:           dedupedExactCount = validated.dedupedExactCount;
959:           if (repairAttempted && input.onLifecycleEvent) {
960:             await input.onLifecycleEvent('review_analysis_repair_output_received', {
961:               validationErrorCount,
962:               valid: true,
963:             });
964:           }
965:           if (input.onLifecycleEvent) {
966:             await input.onLifecycleEvent('review_analysis_output_validated', {
967:               firstPassValid,
968:               repairAttempted,
969:               repairSucceeded,
970:               validationErrorCount,
971:               findingCount: validated.output.findings.length,
972:             });
973:           }
974:           return {
975:             findings: validated.output.findings,
976:             summary: validated.output.summary,
977:             furtherPassesLowYield: validated.output.furtherPassesLowYield,
978:             intent: null,
979:             provider: 'cloudflare_agents_sdk',
980:             model,
981:             stepsExecuted: step,
982:             usedTools,
983:             validation: {
984:               firstPassValid,
985:               repairAttempted,
986:               repairSucceeded,
987:               validationErrorCount,
988:               dedupedExactCount,
989:               fallbackApplied,
990:               fallbackReason,
991:             },
992:           };
993:         } catch (error) {
994:           if (error instanceof ReviewAgentOutputError && isGenericProviderCompletionSummary(action.summary)) {
995:             const wrapped = new ReviewAgentOutputError(
996:               'Review agent returned provider completion text instead of structured JSON; applying schema repair/fallback path'
997:             ).withCode('review_analysis_invalid_output', {
998:               errors: [{ path: '$', message: 'Provider completion summary returned instead of required JSON payload.' }],
999:             });
1000:             error = wrapped;
1001:           }
1002: 
1003:           if (error instanceof ReviewAgentOutputError && !repairAttempted && step < maxSteps) {
1004:             finalValidationError = error;
1005:             repairAttempted = true;

1014:               await input.onLifecycleEvent('review_analysis_repair_requested', {

1024:             history.push({

1047:             continue;

1049: 
1050:           if (error instanceof ReviewAgentOutputError && repairAttempted) {
1051:             finalValidationError = error;

1053:             validationErrorCount = validationErrors.length;
1054:             if (input.onLifecycleEvent) {

1060:               await input.onLifecycleEvent('review_analysis_output_fallback_applied', {

1101:       usedTools.push(action.tool);

1824:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1825:       throw new WorkspaceTaskIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
1826:     }
1827: 
1828:     const existingTask = await getWorkspaceTask(db, input.workspaceId, concurrent.task_id);
1829:     if (!existingTask) {
1830:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1831:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing task ${concurrent.task_id}`);
1832:     }
1833: 
1834:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_tasks WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
1835:     return { task: existingTask, reused: true };
1836:   }
1837: 
1838:   return { task: toWorkspaceTaskResponse(taskRecord), reused: false };
1839: }
